instructions: Review the final slate as a reader-facing football editor, not as the scorer.
Fact accuracy is non-negotiable: use only candidate_pool, selection_decision, copy, validation files, and SQLite facts when needed.
Check whether any obvious direct-impact player from the top headline group has been omitted without a convincing reason.

Check whether the selected public-card count fits public_card_count and the day's match_count. A shorter slate is acceptable when remaining cases are thin; a longer slate needs enough independently strong public cases.
Check whether one match is overrepresented relative to the day unless each card has an independently strong public case.
Reject weak Progression Engine, Goalkeeper Watch, Hidden Gem, or defensive stories when the public case depends on thin or misused metrics.

Check Chinese and English copy for unsupported observations, AI-ish abstraction, display-name register, and negated contrast claims such as 'not only...' or '不是只在...' that the data cannot directly prove.
If a blocking issue remains, set status to failed and explain the concrete revision needed. If revised artifacts resolve the issue, set status to pass and summarize the revision.
